summary: The diff shows modifications to frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx that implement a 'Meet the Manager' section. The file summaries indicate the section displays Allen A. with his photo and biography. However, the critical asset file (90s.jpg in frontend/public/assets/generated/) is not shown in the diff as added, which is required by REQ-48.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add the uploaded manager photo (90s.jpg) as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows 0 files added, but REQ-48 explicitly requires adding 90s.jpg to frontend/public/assets/generated/. The image file is not present in the ADDED FILES section of the diff.
